summary: The user, a Senior Marketing Specialist, is seeking to improve their data analysis skills following a recent promotion. They plan to start a Coursera course next month and are focusing on building a solid foundation in data analysis principles before learning programming languages like Python or R.
facts: The user was promoted to Senior Marketing Specialist three months ago. The user plans to start a Coursera course on data analysis next month. The user intends to focus on building a solid foundation in data analysis principles before learning programming languages like Python or R. The user is considering learning Pandas and NumPy first for data analysis in Python. The user plans to move on to Matplotlib and Seaborn for data visualization after mastering Pandas and NumPy. The user aims to learn Scikit-learn for machine learning and data modeling after gaining proficiency in data visualization. The user is interested in joining online communities to connect with others who share their interests in data analysis.
